docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFFS DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 15182043) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ERIN E. PATTERSON FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-16-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-08-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
